scoreboard.title: Adventurer Ranking
scoreboard.subtitle: Completed days rule. Completed tasks break ties in the battle for the top.
scoreboard.global: Global ranking. Data is shared across browsers and devices.
scoreboard.local: Local scoreboard. Configure Supabase to share progress across devices.
scoreboard.local_error: Local scoreboard. Could not reach Supabase; using this browser's progress.
scoreboard.identity_warning: Identity uses only the typed name: anyone can impersonate another player. The ranking is shared, but it's not anti-cheat yet; that requires Supabase Auth or Minecraft server verification.
scoreboard.guest_message: You're viewing the ranking as a guest. Log in to save your tasks and appear with your own progress.
scoreboard.no_days_hint: Mark all five tasks of a day to turn it into a completed day and climb the ranking.

claims.title: Mission Claims
claims.no_claims: You don't have any claims yet. Complete all tasks of a day to claim your reward.
claims.claim_error: Could not process the claim. Try again.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.unauthorized: You don't have access to the admin panel.
admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

errors.mutation_failed: Could not save the change. Try again.
